seoTitle: How to Link Outlook With Microsoft Teams
metaDescription: Connect Outlook and Teams by enabling the Teams Meeting add-in, generating instant video links for calendar events, and sharing emails to chat channels.
intro: Copying meeting links between separate apps or watching your status lag behind your actual calendar wastes time. This guide covers enabling the Teams meeting add-in in Outlook, generating virtual meeting links from your calendar, and using the Share to Teams command to move key conversations into project channels.

steps.heading: Check your account login
steps.body: Confirm both apps are signed into the same unified tenant account before setting up the integration.

steps.heading: Verify your COM add-ins
steps.body: Open Outlook Options and check your COM Add-ins list to make sure the Teams add-in is present.

steps.heading: Enable the Teams Meeting add-in
steps.body: Turn on the Microsoft Teams Meeting Add-in for Microsoft Office if it isn't already active.

steps.heading: Create a calendar event
steps.body: Go to Calendar view and start a new event entry.

steps.heading: Generate a Teams link
steps.body: Toggle the Online Teams Meeting switch to automatically generate a joining link for the event.

steps.heading: Share emails to Teams
steps.body: Use the Share to Teams control inside a mail window to send important message threads into a project channel.

faq.question: What if the Teams Meeting button is missing from my ribbon?
faq.answer: Check your COM Add-ins settings in Outlook Options, since the add-in may need to be manually enabled to restore the button.

faq.question: Does my calendar status automatically sync to Teams?
faq.answer: Yes, calendar events are designed to sync with your Teams presence badge, flipping your status to Busy or Out of Office based on your schedule.

faq.question: Can I share an entire email thread into a Teams channel?
faq.answer: Yes, the Share to Teams command lets you route a message thread into a Teams channel or chat directly from Outlook.

faq.question: Why would the sync between the two apps stop working?
faq.answer: Broken sync hooks often trace back to a disabled COM add-in, so checking that settings list is the first troubleshooting step.
